name: Illinois Tool Works Inc.
description: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) is a global multi-industrial manufacturing leader that designs and produces a wide range of highly engineered fasteners and components, equipment and consumable systems, and specialty products. Operating across seven industry-leading segments—including Automotive OEM, Construction Products, Food Equipment, Specialty Products, Test & Measurement and Electronics, Welding, and Polymers & Fluids—ITW serves customers in diverse end markets worldwide. The company utilizes its proprietary ITW Business Model, centered on the 80/20 business process, customer-back innovation, and a decentralized entrepreneurial culture, to drive organic growth and high-margin performance.
